name: Plum Sauce for Plum Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar and flour in a saucepan.
2. Stir until well combined.
3. Gradually add the plum juice and water, stirring constantly.
4. Cook over medium heat for 1 minute, stirring frequently to prevent sticking.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the butter until melted and fully incorporated.
